languages.text: "Постойте. Я не подпущу вас к отцу, то есть к Лорд-капитану, пока вы не объяснитесь со мной". {n}Женщина в облегченной броне хватает вас за локоть. На ее лице следы недавнего боя: бровь заклеена, правая щека покрыта сетью царапин. Лазурные глаза, линия скул и упрямый излом рта ясно выдают сходство с беглым Мастером Шепотов Теодоры.{/n} "Я — Лария Войгтвир, сенешаль и соратница Себериана фон Валанциуса".
languages.translation_comment:
Не играет DL_OncePerLoop_LariaFirstTalk и играет DL_LariaHasQuestion
Стартуем DL_OncePerLoop_LariaFirstTalk

languages.text: "Stop. I won't let you see Father — I mean, the Lord Captain — until you explain yourself to me." {n}A woman in light armour seizes you by the elbow. Her face bears the traces of a recent battle: her eyebrow is bandaged, and her right cheek is covered in a web of scratches. Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."
languages.original_text: "Постойте. Я не подпущу вас к отцу, то есть к Лорд-капитану, пока вы не объяснитесь со мной". {n}Женщина в облегченной броне хватает вас за локоть. На ее лице следы недавнего боя: бровь заклеена, правая щека покрыта сетью царапин. Лазурные глаза, линия скул и упрямый излом рта ясно выдают сходство с беглым Мастером Шепотов Теодоры.{/n} "Я — Лария Войгтвир, сенешаль и соратница Себериана фон Валанциуса".

Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."

languages.text: “站住。在你解释清楚之前，休想见到父亲，也就是舰长大人。”{n}一个身穿轻便护甲的女子一把抓住你的手肘。她脸上还带着刚刚战斗过的痕迹，眉骨上包扎着绷带，右脸全是细碎的抓痕。她那湛蓝的眼睛、凸出的颧骨，还有嘴角那股倔劲儿，都与西奥多拉手下那名在逃的低语之主惊人地相似。{/n}“我是总领菈丽雅·维特威尔，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的亲密盟友。”
languages.original_text: "Stop. I won't let you see Father — I mean, the Lord Captain — until you explain yourself to me." {n}A woman in light armour seizes you by the elbow. Her face bears the traces of a recent battle: her eyebrow is bandaged, and her right cheek is covered in a web of scratches. Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: “站住。在你解释清楚之前，休想见到父亲，也就是舰长大人。”{n}一个身穿轻便护甲的女子一把抓住你的手肘。她脸上还带着刚刚战斗过的痕迹，眉骨上包扎着绷带，右脸全是细碎的抓痕。她那湛蓝的眼睛、凸出的颧骨，还有嘴角那股倔劲儿，都与西奥多拉手下那名在逃的低语之主惊人地相似。{/n}“我是总领菈丽雅·维特威尔，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的亲密盟友。”

languages.text: « Halte-là. Je ne vous autoriserai pas à voir mon père... le seigneur-capitaine avant que vous ne m'ayez expliqué les raisons de votre présence ici. » {n}Une femme revêtue d'une armure légère vous saisit par le coude. Son visage porte les traces d'un récent combat : son front est bandé, et sa joue droite couverte d'égratignures. Ses yeux bleu azur, ses pommettes saillantes et le pincement buté de ses lèvres présentent une ressemblance frappante avec le maître des murmures en fuite de Théodora.{/n} « Je m'appelle Laria Voigtvir, sénéchale et proche alliée de Seberian von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: "Stop. I won't let you see Father — I mean, the Lord Captain — until you explain yourself to me." {n}A woman in light armour seizes you by the elbow. Her face bears the traces of a recent battle: her eyebrow is bandaged, and her right cheek is covered in a web of scratches. Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: « Halte-là. Je ne vous autoriserai pas à voir mon père... le seigneur-capitaine avant que vous ne m'ayez expliqué les raisons de votre présence ici. » {n}Une femme revêtue d'une armure légère vous saisit par le coude. Son visage porte les traces d'un récent combat : son front est bandé, et sa joue droite couverte d'égratignures. Ses yeux bleu azur, ses pommettes saillantes et le pincement buté de ses lèvres présentent une ressemblance frappante avec le maître des murmures en fuite de Théodora.{/n} « Je m'appelle Laria Voigtvir, sénéchale et proche alliée de Seberian von Valancius. »

languages.text: "Dur. Bana kendinizi tanıtmadan babamı, yani Lord Kaptan'ı görmenize izin veremem." {n}Hafif zırh kuşanmış bir kadın seni dirseğinden yakalıyor. Yakın zamanda gerçekleşen bir savaştan kalma izleri hâlâ taze. Kaşı bandajlı, sağ yanağı ise çizikten geçilmiyor. Gökyüzü mavisi gözleri, keskin elmacık kemikleri ve dudaklarındaki inatçı kıvrım; Theodora'nın kaçak Fısıltı Üstadı'yla olan belirgin benzerliğini ele veriyor.{/n} "Ben Seberian von Valancius'un Seneşali ve yakın müttefiki Laria Voigtvir."
languages.original_text: "Stop. I won't let you see Father — I mean, the Lord Captain — until you explain yourself to me." {n}A woman in light armour seizes you by the elbow. Her face bears the traces of a recent battle: her eyebrow is bandaged, and her right cheek is covered in a web of scratches. Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Dur. Bana kendinizi tanıtmadan babamı, yani Lord Kaptan'ı görmenize izin veremem." {n}Hafif zırh kuşanmış bir kadın seni dirseğinden yakalıyor. Yakın zamanda gerçekleşen bir savaştan kalma izleri hâlâ taze. Kaşı bandajlı, sağ yanağı ise çizikten geçilmiyor. Gökyüzü mavisi gözleri, keskin elmacık kemikleri ve dudaklarındaki inatçı kıvrım; Theodora'nın kaçak Fısıltı Üstadı'yla olan belirgin benzerliğini ele veriyor.{/n} "Ben Seberian von Valancius'un Seneşali ve yakın müttefiki Laria Voigtvir."

languages.text: «Alto. No permitiré que vea a mi padre... Quiero decir, al Lord Capitán, hasta que explique su situación». {n}Una mujer con armadura ligera te agarra del codo. Su rostro muestra las consecuencias de una batalla reciente: tiene una gasa en la ceja y su mejilla derecha está cubierta por una red de arañazos. Sus ojos cerúleos, sus pómulos afilados y el gesto obstinado de sus labios presentan una similaridad sorprendente al maestro de susurros fugitivo de Theodora.{/n} «Soy Laria Voigtvir, Senescal y aliada cercana de Seberian von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "Stop. I won't let you see Father — I mean, the Lord Captain — until you explain yourself to me." {n}A woman in light armour seizes you by the elbow. Her face bears the traces of a recent battle: her eyebrow is bandaged, and her right cheek is covered in a web of scratches. Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: «Alto. No permitiré que vea a mi padre... Quiero decir, al Lord Capitán, hasta que explique su situación». {n}Una mujer con armadura ligera te agarra del codo. Su rostro muestra las consecuencias de una batalla reciente: tiene una gasa en la ceja y su mejilla derecha está cubierta por una red de arañazos. Sus ojos cerúleos, sus pómulos afilados y el gesto obstinado de sus labios presentan una similaridad sorprendente al maestro de susurros fugitivo de Theodora.{/n} «Soy Laria Voigtvir, Senescal y aliada cercana de Seberian von Valancius».

languages.text: "Hört auf. Ich lasse Euch erst zu Vater — also zum Lord Captain — wenn Ihr Euch mir erklärt habt." {n}Eine Frau in leichter Rüstung packt dich am Ellbogen. Auf ihrem Gesicht finden sich Spuren eines kürzlichen Kampfes. Ihre Augenbraue ist bandagiert, ihre rechte Wange mit Kratzern übersät. Ihre coelinblauen Augen, die scharfen Wangenknochen und der störrische Zug um ihre Lippen haben eine verblüffende Ähnlichkeit mit Theodoras flüchtigem Meister des Geflüsters.{/n} "Ich bin Laria Voigtvir, Truchsessin und enge Verbündete von Seberian von Valancius."
languages.original_text: "Stop. I won't let you see Father — I mean, the Lord Captain — until you explain yourself to me." {n}A woman in light armour seizes you by the elbow. Her face bears the traces of a recent battle: her eyebrow is bandaged, and her right cheek is covered in a web of scratches. Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Hört auf. Ich lasse Euch erst zu Vater — also zum Lord Captain — wenn Ihr Euch mir erklärt habt." {n}Eine Frau in leichter Rüstung packt dich am Ellbogen. Auf ihrem Gesicht finden sich Spuren eines kürzlichen Kampfes. Ihre Augenbraue ist bandagiert, ihre rechte Wange mit Kratzern übersät. Ihre coelinblauen Augen, die scharfen Wangenknochen und der störrische Zug um ihre Lippen haben eine verblüffende Ähnlichkeit mit Theodoras flüchtigem Meister des Geflüsters.{/n} "Ich bin Laria Voigtvir, Truchsessin und enge Verbündete von Seberian von Valancius."

languages.text: 「止まれ。父、つまり、主である船長に会うことは許さない。お前が自分を説明するまでは。」{n}軽装の女性があなたの肘をつかむ。彼女の顔には、最近の戦いの痕跡が残っている。眉は包帯で覆われ、右頬には傷の跡が蜘蛛の巣のように広がっている。彼女の天青色の瞳、鋭い頬骨、そして頑固な唇の癖は、逃亡したテオドラの密使にそっくりである。{/n}「私はラリア・ヴォイストヴィル、セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランキウスの執事であり、親友である。」
languages.original_text: "Stop. I won't let you see Father — I mean, the Lord Captain — until you explain yourself to me." {n}A woman in light armour seizes you by the elbow. Her face bears the traces of a recent battle: her eyebrow is bandaged, and her right cheek is covered in a web of scratches. Her cerulean blue eyes, sharp cheekbones, and the stubborn quirk of her lips betray a marked resemblance to Theodora's fugitive Master of Whispers.{/n} "I am Laria Voigtvir, Seneschal and close ally of Seberian von Valancius."
